title: Selling Courses from Pakistan Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: In Pakistan, where PayPal and Stripe are blocked, many digital creators struggle to sell their courses online. This problem affects thousands of people worldwide, but there's a permanent structural alternative: crypto-native infrastructure, which allows them to collect payments from anywhere in the world without the need for PayPal, Stripe, or other conventional payment processors. If you're among these creators, it's time to break free from geographic restrictions and start selling your digital products without limits.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for selling digital products, but they come with significant restrictions, especially for creators in countries like Pakistan. These platforms often require extensive Know-Your-Customer (KYC) procedures, which can be lengthy and sometimes impossible to complete, especially for individuals without a verified international bank account. In contrast, NOWPayments, the payment processor used by Unchained Commerce, allows one-time purchases without KYC requirements, making it possible for creators to start selling their products instantly. NOWPayments supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, providing a seamless payment experience for customers worldwide.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Conventional payment processors often block countries due to regulatory concerns or geographical restrictions. PayPal, for instance, has a long list of blocked countries, including Pakistan, Nigeria, and Ghana. Stripe's restrictions are also extensive, affecting creators in several countries. In contrast, NOWPayments does not impose any geographical restrictions, allowing creators to sell their digital products globally, without the need for PayPal or Stripe. This gives Unchained Commerce an advantage, as creators can now sell their products without worrying about being blocked by conventional payment processors.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, conventional platforms like PayPal and Stripe often take several days to process transactions. NOWPayments, on the other hand, offers instant payment processing, allowing creators to receive their earnings immediately. Regarding fees, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers competitive pricing, with a one-time payment of $79.99 for the complete store infrastructure. This includes the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard, priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. In contrast, conventional platforms often charge higher fees, ranging from 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction for PayPal to 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction for Stripe.
Geo-restricted creators can finally sell digital products online without the need for PayPal, Stripe, or other conventional payment processors.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is key to any successful online store. Unchained Commerce's Core Engine allows creators to automate delivery of their digital products, including ebooks, courses, and software, without the need for manual intervention. This means that customers can access their purchased products immediately after completing the payment. Additionally, the Core Engine provides automated payment verification, PDF receipts, and transaction logs, making it easier for creators to manage their online store.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital creator in Pakistan or any other restricted country, the choice is clear: Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers a permanent structural alternative to conventional payment processors. With NOWPayments, instant payment processing, and automated delivery capabilities, you can start selling your digital products without limits, without the need for PayPal, Stripe, or other conventional payment processors. Don't let geographic restrictions hold you back any longer; break free and start selling your products today.
